message:
feat(tui): rewrite dashboard with reactive layout, anomaly detection, and percentile trending

Replace the static summary-bar + progress-bar dashboard layout with a
responsive composition system that adapts to terminal size and surfaces
operational anomalies proactively:

Reactive layout engine:
- Terminal-class-aware panel budgets (Tiny/Compact/Standard/Wide/UltraWide)
- Summary band uses MetricTile grid instead of inline text, showing
  uptime, requests, avg latency, messages, agents, and ack-pending
  with per-metric trend indicators
- Main content splits into event log (primary) + trend panel (inspector)
  when terminal width permits (Wide/UltraWide)

Anomaly detection:
- Runtime anomaly detector evaluates ack-pending backlog, 5xx error rate,
  and event ring buffer pressure against configurable thresholds
- Anomalies render as AnomalyCards in a dedicated rail between summary
  band and main content (hidden on small terminals)
- Three severity levels: Medium, High, Critical with confidence scores

Percentile trending:
- Rolling PercentileSample history (p50/p95/p99) computed from sparkline
  data at each stat refresh interval
- PercentileRibbon widget renders trend visualization in the inspector
  panel alongside BrailleActivity throughput chart
- Throughput delta tracking for request rate trend computation

New keybindings:
- 'p' toggles trend panel visibility

Dependencies:
- Add sqlmodel-sqlite to dev-dependencies for fixture matrix tests

Snapshot updates:
- All 4 dashboard snapshots updated to reflect the new MetricTile
  grid layout replacing the old inline summary bars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
